_source.fields: name and block are the registry's village/block labels; lat/lon are the registry's own coordinates; type is the scheme the shelter was built under (NCRMP, MCS, IRCS, ICZMP etc).
caveats: Capacity is NOT published in this registry, so no capacity figure is stored. Do not reintroduce one without a sourced number.
Jagatsinghpur returns only 5 shelters from OSDMA. The district has far more in reality — the upstream registry is incomplete, not the scrape.
One Ganjam row (Kesapur) is labelled block 'Balasore Sadar' in the source. Its coordinates sit inside Ganjam, so the coordinates are trustworthy and the block label is not.
Names are the registry's village/site labels, title-cased for display. They are not formal shelter names.
